Records.authors: Böttcher, Nico, Schwanemann, Niklas, Weinzierl, Stefan
Records.description: Two-loop box integral with fermion bubble insertion for electroweak corrections. Topology G: $m_2=m_Z$, $m_3=0$, $m_4=0$. One massive gauge boson, all other lines massless. No square roots. Relevant to Moller experiment (e-e scattering).
Records.familyName: Box with fermion bubble, topology G (mZ, 0, 0)

Names: Box with fermion bubble, topology G (mZ, 0, 0)

Results.resultTeXPreview: -\frac{1}{\varepsilon^3 (4 m^2 s_{23}-4 s_{12} s_{23})}+\frac{2 \log \left(1-\frac{s_{12}}{m^2}\right)+\log (s_{23})+i \pi -1}{2 \varepsilon^2 s_{23} (m^2-s_{12})}+\frac{12 H\left(0,\frac{m^2+s_{23}}{s_{12}+s_{23}}\,;1\right)-12 H\left(\frac{m^2}{s_{12}},\frac{m^2+s_{23}}{s_{12}+s_{23}}\,;1\right)+24 H\left(0,\frac{m^2}{s_{12}}\,;1\right)-6 \log ^2\left(\frac{m^2-s_{12}}{m^2+s_{23}}\right)-12 \log \left(1-\frac{s_{12}}{m^2}\right) \log \left(\frac{s_{12}-m^2}{s_{23}}\right)-24 \log (s_{23}) \log \left(1-\frac{s_{12}}{m^2}\right)+12 \log \left(1-\frac{s_{12}}{m^2}\right) \log \left(\frac{m^2-s_{12}}{m^2+s_{23}}\right)-12 \log \left(-\frac{s_{23}}{m^2}\right) \log \left(\frac{m^2-s_{12}}{m^2+s_{23}}\right)-12 \log ^2\left(1-\frac{s_{12}}{m^2}\right)-24 i \pi  \log \left(1-\frac{s_{12}}{m^2}\right)+24 \log \left(1-\frac{s_{12}}{m^2}\right)-33 \zeta(2)-6 \log ^2(s_{23})+6 \log (-s_{23})-12 i \pi  \log (s_{23})+6 \log (s_{23})+11 \pi ^2+6 i \pi -12}{12 \varepsilon s_{23} (m^2-s_{12})}+(\text{more terms})+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
